items.title: venv & virtualenv
items.description: Conda solves the same isolation problem but also manages non-Python/system binaries that venv cannot.

items.title: pip & requirements.txt
items.description: Pip can be used inside a conda env (via a pip: block) for PyPI-only packages.

items.title: Lockfiles & Reproducibility
items.description: environment.yml (especially --from-history) plays the reproducibility role for conda environments.
